Netflix is expected to update its global Top 10 TV shows list on top10.netflix.com on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, 3:00 PM ET, reflecting viewership from the previous week (Monday to Sunday).

This market will resolve based on which show this update ranks as the #1 global Netflix show.

The ranking is based on total views globally, as reported by Netflix for TV shows (English only).

If the top10.netflix.com update does not occur by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

question: Total Kills Over/Under 45.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Spirit and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 1:40PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 46 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Team Spirit vs MOUZ (BO1) - BLAST Slam Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Spirit and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Spirit" if Team Spirit win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against Team Spirit.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 4, 1:45PM-2:00PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 5, 2PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Dota 2: Tundra Esports vs MOUZ (BO1) - BLAST Slam Group Stage
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Tundra Esports and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 4 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Tundra Esports" if Tundra Esports win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against Tundra Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Will Donald Trump post 0-19 Truth Social posts from February 6 to February 13, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Donald Trump (@realDonaldTrump), posts on Truth Social between February 6, 12:00 PM ET and February 13, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, Truth Social itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

question: Will "Bridgerton: Season 4" be the #2 US Netflix show this week? (February 10)
description:
Netflix is expected to update its Top 10 TV shows list on top10.netflix.com on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, 3:00 PM ET, reflecting viewership from the previous week (Monday to Sunday).

This market will resolve based on which show this update ranks as the #2 Netflix show in the United States.

The ranking is based on total views in the United States, as reported by Netflix for TV shows.

If the top10.netflix.com update does not occur by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

question: US x Iran meeting by February 6, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is an official diplomatic meeting between government representatives of the United States and Iran by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to “No”.

Official diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy on behalf of their government. Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, meetings through a third-party relaying messages (not including translators), or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present and interacting with each other will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran, and a consensus of credible reporting.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 48.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Falcons and Natus Vincere in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 2:30PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 49 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: Blue Jackets vs. Devils: O/U 5.5
description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for February 3 at 7:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Blue Jackets and Devils combine to score 6 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 6, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

events.title: Blue Jackets vs. Devils
events.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for February 3 at 7:00PM ET:
If the Blue Jackets win, the market will resolve to "Blue Jackets".
If the Devils win, the market will resolve to "Devils".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - February 4, 2:15PM-2:30PM ET
description:

Netflix is expected to update its Top 10 Movies list on top10.netflix.com on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, 3:00 PM ET, reflecting viewership from the previous week (Monday to Sunday).

This market will resolve based on which movie this update ranks as the #1 Netflix movie in the United States.

The ranking is based on total views in the United States, as reported by Netflix for movies.

If the top10.netflix.com update does not occur by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

question: Total Kills Over/Under 56.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Yandex and OG in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 1:15PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 57 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

description:

This market will resolve to the NBA team that officially acquires James Harden in a trade from the Los Angeles Clippers before the 2025-2026 NBA season trade deadline, February 5, 2026, 3:00 PM ET.

If James Harden is cut, retires, is not on an NBA roster as of the resolution date, or otherwise remains on the Clippers through the NBA trade deadline, this market will resolve to "Not Traded".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Los Angeles Clippers and/or the acquiring team; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 4, 2:30PM-2:45PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 42.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Falcons and Natus Vincere in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 2:35PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 43 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Team Falcons vs Natus Vincere (BO1) - BLAST Slam Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Falcons and Natus Vincere in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons win the match against Natus Vincere.

This market will resolve to "Natus Vincere" if Natus Vincere win the match against Team Falcons.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Will "The Rip" be the #2 US Netflix movie this week? (February 10)
description:
Netflix is expected to update its Top 10 Movies list on top10.netflix.com on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, 3:00 PM ET, reflecting viewership from the previous week (Monday to Sunday).

This market will resolve based on which movie this update ranks as the #2 Netflix movie in the United States.

The ranking is based on total views in the United States, as reported by Netflix for movies.

If the top10.netflix.com update does not occur by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

question: Will Eli Lilly say "Mounjaro" during earnings call?
description:
This market will resolve based on the next earnings announcement of Eli Lilly currently scheduled to take place on February 4, 2026 at 10AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed term is mentioned by anyone during this event. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A Q&A event will count toward the resolution of this market.

If this event is definitely cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be audio of the event.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 42.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Heroic and Xtreme Gaming in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 2:40PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 43 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Heroic vs Xtreme Gaming (BO1) - BLAST Slam Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Heroic and Xtreme Gaming in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against Xtreme Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Xtreme Gaming" if Xtreme Gaming win the match against Heroic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 4, 2:45PM-3:00PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the next official US-Iran meeting be in Oman?
description:
This market will resolve according to the country in which the next official diplomatic meeting between government representatives of the United States and Iran takes place by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

Official diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the US and Iran who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their government. Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, meetings through a third-party relaying messages (not including translators), or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present and interacting with each other will not count.

If the next official meetings between government representatives of the United States and Iran takes place in any country other than the listed options, this market will resolve to “Another Country”.

If no qualifying meeting takes place by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No Meeting by Feb 13”.

If a qualifying meeting occurs in more than one country, resolution will be based on where the meeting begins.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran, and a consensus of credible reporting.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 4, 3:45PM-4:00PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will Microchip Technology say "Impact" during earnings call?
description:
This market will resolve based on the next earnings announcement of Microchip Technology currently scheduled to take place on February 5, 2026 at 5PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed term is mentioned by anyone during this event. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A Q&A event will count toward the resolution of this market.

If this event is definitely cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be audio of the event.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 41.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between GamerLegion and OG in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 3:50PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 42 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: GamerLegion vs OG (BO1) - BLAST Slam Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and OG in the BLAST Slam Group Stage, scheduled for February 3 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion win the match against OG.

This market will resolve to "OG" if OG win the match against GamerLegion.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 5, 4PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Canisius Golden Griffins vs. Niagara Purple Eagles: O/U 127.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 3 at 6:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Canisius Golden Griffins and Niagara Purple Eagles combine to score 128 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 128, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 4, 4:15PM-4:30PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Solana Up or Down - February 5, 5PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
